subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the celestial wine whilst men remained in manifest veils - they who have hearkened and turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق الحیوان اذ کان الناس فی حجاب مبین الذین سمعوا و اقبلوا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
